notes: This catalog defines package recommendation candidates only.
It does not modify current runtime KB or retriever artifacts.
Only evidence-supported package components are included.

evidence_reference_policy.legacy_support_policy: Legacy notes must not be used as primary package support. If retained, they must be separated as legacy_support_notes.

packages.display_name_vi: Goi sang loc co ban thieu mau / nhiem trung
packages.short_description: CBC-only basic screening package for low-blood-count or infection-oriented discussion when no red flags are active.
packages.intended_use: General, non-emergency screening-oriented recommendation for users asking about basic anemia or infection-related blood testing.
packages.goal: Offer a basic CBC-centered screening package for users asking about low-blood-count or infection-oriented blood testing at a general, non-emergency level.
candidate_if: User asks for a basic screening blood test for anemia concern.
User asks for a basic screening blood test for infection concern.
User wants a simple first-step blood package and no red-flag symptoms are present.
exclude_if: Emergency or urgent red flags are present.
User asks the system to diagnose anemia or infection.
User requests unsupported add-on tests such as ferritin, iron studies, cultures, or pathogen-specific screening.

notes: Structured logic is draft-only and is not a runtime rule engine yet.
Unsupported ferritin, iron-study, culture, or pathogen-specific add-ons remain outside current package scope.

prep_rules: No CBC-specific preparation rule is promoted in this pass.
Only generic blood-draw preparation may be referenced later if needed.

notes: No authoritative CBC-specific preparation support is promoted in this draft.

escalation_rules: Escalate if red-flag routing is triggered.
Escalate if user requests diagnosis or interpretation beyond basic package advice.

notes: Urgent care escalation takes priority over package recommendation.

packages.interpretation_boundary: CBC abnormalities may support further medical evaluation, but the package does not diagnose anemia, infection, or blood disorders.
unsupported_or_missing: No dedicated ferritin or iron-study support
packages.support_summary: Direct versioned KB support exists for CBC meaning and CBC use in anemia/infection-oriented evaluation.
preparation_notes: No CBC-specific fasting rule is promoted in the current draft.
If needed, only generic blood-draw preparation language should be used.
exclusion_notes: Do not use when urgent red flags are present.
Do not use when the user is asking for diagnosis or unsupported add-on tests.
escalation_notes: Escalate immediately for active red flags.
Escalate for medical review if the user wants diagnosis or result interpretation.

followup_question_templates.question_vi: Ban co the mo ta ngan gon trieu chung hoac ly do muon kiem tra mau khong?
Ban co sot hoac cam giac dang co nhiem trung khong?
Ban co met rat nhieu, yeu nhanh, hoac tinh trang dang xau di khong?

source_support_status.support_summary: Direct versioned KB support exists for CBC meaning and CBC use in anemia/infection-oriented evaluation.
unsupported_or_missing: No dedicated ferritin or iron-study support

packages.display_name_vi: Goi sang loc co ban duong huyet
packages.short_description: Glucose-oriented screening draft with only generic support in the current KB.
packages.intended_use: Planning-only package candidate for basic blood sugar screening discussions when the request stays non-urgent and within current evidence limits.
packages.goal: Represent a basic glucose-oriented screening package candidate without claiming diabetes diagnosis.
candidate_if: User asks generally about checking blood sugar.
User asks for a basic screening-oriented blood test package and no red flags are present.
exclude_if: User has urgent symptoms needing medical review.
User asks the system to diagnose diabetes.
User requests HbA1c or other unsupported package components not grounded in current repo evidence.

notes: This package remains partial because the current support is generic, not package-specific.
Partial support means this package must not be exposed as runtime-allowed.

prep_rules: Some glucose tests may require fasting; the exact requirement must be confirmed with the care site.
Do not claim a single fasting rule for all glucose requests.

notes: Current preparation wording is supported only as a legacy support note, not as primary package evidence.

escalation_rules: Escalate if symptoms are acute or concerning.
Escalate if the user requests diagnosis, treatment, or medication advice.

notes: Because this package is partial, guarded handling is mandatory.

packages.interpretation_boundary: A glucose-oriented package may support general screening discussion, but it does not diagnose or exclude diabetes on its own.
unsupported_or_missing: No dedicated glucose explainer in the versioned KB
packages.support_summary: Versioned KB support is limited to generic blood-glucose mention as a common blood test. A legacy note exists for cautious fasting guidance.
preparation_notes: Some glucose tests may require fasting.
Preparation must be confirmed with the care site before recommendation is operationalized.
exclusion_notes: Do not use for diagnosis requests.
Do not use when the user expects HbA1c or other unsupported diabetes package components.
escalation_notes: Escalate for urgent symptoms or red flags.
Escalate for treatment or medication requests.

followup_question_templates.question_vi: Lan gan nhat ban an khi nao?
Neu can nhin an truoc xet nghiem, ban co the sap xep duoc khong?
Ban co non oi, mat nuoc, hoac tinh trang dang xau di nhanh khong?

source_support_status.support_summary: Versioned KB support is limited to generic blood-glucose mention as a common blood test. A legacy note exists for cautious fasting guidance.
unsupported_or_missing: No dedicated glucose explainer in the versioned KB

packages.display_name_vi: Goi sang loc co ban mo mau
packages.short_description: Lipid-focused screening draft with only generic support in the current KB.
packages.intended_use: Planning-only package candidate for basic lipid or cholesterol screening discussions when the request stays non-urgent and within current evidence limits.
packages.goal: Represent a basic lipid-focused screening package candidate for non-emergency general health discussions.
candidate_if: User asks generally about cholesterol testing.
User asks for a basic health-screening package and no red flags are present.
exclude_if: User has chest pain, shortness of breath, stroke-like symptoms, or other urgent signals.
User asks the system to estimate cardiovascular risk clinically.
User requests unsupported metabolic add-ons not grounded in current repo evidence.

notes: This package remains partial because the current support is generic and not dedicated to lipid-package reasoning.
Chest pain, shortness of breath, or stroke-like symptoms must route away from screening logic.

prep_rules: Some lipid tests may require fasting depending on local instruction.
Do not claim fasting as universal unless the service later has structured local rules.

notes: Current preparation wording is supported only as a legacy support note, not as primary package evidence.

escalation_rules: Escalate if current symptoms suggest urgent cardiovascular evaluation rather than screening.
Escalate if the user asks for diagnosis or treatment planning.

notes: Because this package is partial, guarded handling is mandatory.

packages.interpretation_boundary: A lipid-focused package may support screening discussion, but it does not diagnose heart disease or determine treatment.
unsupported_or_missing: No dedicated lipid panel explainer in the versioned KB
packages.support_summary: Versioned KB support is limited to generic lipid-profile mention as a common blood test. A legacy note exists for cautious fasting guidance.
preparation_notes: Some lipid tests may require fasting.
Preparation must be confirmed with the care site before recommendation is operationalized.
exclusion_notes: Do not use when urgent cardiovascular-like symptoms are present.
Do not use for requests that require formal cardiovascular risk estimation.
escalation_notes: Escalate for active red flags such as chest pain or shortness of breath.
Escalate for diagnosis or treatment requests.

followup_question_templates.question_vi: Ban vua an gan day chua, va neu co thi la khi nao?
Neu can nhin an truoc xet nghiem mo mau, ban co the sap xep duoc khong?
Hien tai ban co dau nguc hoac kho tho khong?

source_support_status.support_summary: Versioned KB support is limited to generic lipid-profile mention as a common blood test. A legacy note exists for cautious fasting guidance.
unsupported_or_missing: No dedicated lipid panel explainer in the versioned KB

packages.display_name_vi: Goi sang loc co ban chuc nang than
packages.short_description: BMP-only basic screening package for kidney-function-oriented discussion when no red flags are active.
packages.intended_use: General, non-emergency screening-oriented recommendation for users asking about basic kidney-function blood testing.
packages.goal: Offer a BMP-centered basic package for general kidney and metabolic screening discussion at a non-emergency level.
candidate_if: User asks for a basic kidney-function blood package.
User wants a basic metabolic screening package and no red flags are present.
exclude_if: User has urgent symptoms requiring acute medical evaluation.
User asks the system to diagnose kidney disease.
User requests unsupported kidney add-ons not grounded in current repo evidence.

notes: Structured logic is draft-only and is not a runtime rule engine yet.
Unsupported kidney add-ons remain outside current package scope.

prep_rules: BMP may require fasting in some situations; the service must not overstate this rule.
If preparation is discussed, confirm that instructions depend on the care site.

notes: Current BMP prep wording is supported from the versioned KB but remains high-level.

escalation_rules: Escalate if the user reports urgent symptoms.
Escalate if the user wants diagnosis or treatment recommendations.

notes: Urgent care escalation takes priority over package recommendation.

packages.interpretation_boundary: A BMP-centered package may support basic kidney and metabolic screening discussion, but it does not diagnose kidney disease or explain specific abnormal values on its own.
unsupported_or_missing: No package-specific interpretation rules beyond high-level boundary
packages.support_summary: Direct versioned KB support exists for BMP meaning, use, metabolic framing, and kidney-related screening context.
preparation_notes: If preparation is discussed, confirm that the care site may request fasting in some situations.
exclusion_notes: Do not use when urgent symptoms are active.
Do not use when the user expects diagnosis or unsupported kidney-specific add-ons.
escalation_notes: Escalate for diagnosis or treatment requests.
